quote: The thing I like the most about NitPickr is the credit system, really well designed. You are not just listing a product, you need to give feedback to have a chance of getting feedback.
author: AndyBuildsSaaS

quote: The credit mechanic is clever, it forces people to actually engage instead of just lurking waiting for feedback. And requiring approval before releasing credits is a smart way to avoid low-effort reviews.
author: danielln

quote: This brings back a sense of community that I guess, platforms are missing.
author: santoshk

quote: it's a very nice creative way to engage like minded users, mostly founders who can help each other out by providing valuable rewiews.
author: Saurav
